meta.title: Inter Bus — Bus auto parts
meta.description: Genuine auto parts for Inter Bus coaches. Own stock, fast delivery, full warranty.

home.why_delivery_body: Express courier in Chișinău and across Moldova. International shipping via Nova Poshta, Post MD.
home.why_support_body: Send us the code or a photo — our technical team confirms the right part before you order.

about.hero_title: Bus parts, delivered the way they should be.
about.hero_subtitle: Inter Bus is the bus parts shop with a real warehouse in Chișinău. We stock genuine and verified equivalent parts, ship fast across Moldova and abroad, and answer every technical question.
about.values_subtitle: We don't sell everything. We do one thing well — bus parts.
about.value_stock_body: Over 5,000 parts physically in our warehouse. What you see online is what we ship — no 'we'll get it from Europe in two weeks' surprises.
about.value_genuine_body: We work directly with manufacturers and authorized distributors. Every part comes with an invoice and full manufacturer warranty.
about.value_support_body: Send us the part code or a photo — we'll confirm compatibility before you place the order. No guessing.
about.value_expertise_body: Our team works exclusively with coaches. We know every model, every code, every common failure.
about.story_title: Built for fleets that can't afford downtime
about.story_quote: A bus that's parked means passengers stranded. That's not acceptable.
about.story_p1: We started as a service workshop — repairing buses and constantly hitting the same wall: the right parts came too slow, too expensive, or simply weren't available in Moldova.
about.story_p2: That's how Inter Bus was born. We specialized exclusively in bus parts and built direct relationships with manufacturers. Today we keep a physical stock that covers the most-requested references for fleets running in Moldova and Romania.
about.story_p3: Every part we sell passes through our hands before it reaches you. We don't dropship. We're not the biggest shop. But for buses, we're the one you can rely on.
about.policies_subtitle: Everything you need to know — before and after you order.
about.policy_delivery_point_1: Chișinău: same-day or next-day delivery with our own courier for orders placed by 16:00.
about.policy_delivery_point_2: Moldova: 2-5 business days via Nova Poshta or Post MD.
about.policy_delivery_point_3: Romania and EU: 5-10 business days, cost calculated at checkout.
about.policy_delivery_point_4: Free delivery for orders over 4000 lei within Moldova.
about.policy_warranty_point_1: Manufacturer warranty of 12 months on all genuine parts unless stated otherwise.
about.policy_warranty_point_2: Replacement or full refund for manufacturing defects.
about.policy_warranty_point_3: Keep the invoice — it's enough to open a warranty claim.
about.policy_returns_point_1: Return any part within 14 days, unused and in original packaging.
about.policy_returns_point_2: Refunds arrive in 5-10 business days to the original payment method.
about.policy_returns_point_3: Return shipping for a correct part is paid by the buyer.
about.contact_title: Tell us which part you need
about.contact_subtitle: The code, the bus model, or a photo — anything helps. We reply the same business day.

thanks.contact_body: Thanks! Your message reached the Inter Bus team. We'll reply within one business day.
thanks.register_body: Check your email for the confirmation link. After that you can sign in and place orders.
thanks.b2b_body: Thanks! Our team will verify your company details and reach out to activate the account.

contact.hero_subtitle: Part identification, order status, warranty, or a technical question — we're here for professional fleets.
contact.name: Full name
contact.subject: Subject (optional)
contact.message_placeholder: Part code, bus model, technical question...
contact.success_body: Our team will reply the same business day to the email you provided.
contact.phone_hint: Call or WhatsApp during business hours
contact.delivery_title: Orders placed by 16:00 ship the same day
contact.delivery_body: For urgent shipments, give us a call — we coordinate directly with the courier.

admin.overview_subtitle: What's been happening over the last 30 days.
admin.products_empty: No products yet. Add the first one to get started.
admin.field_slug_hint: Auto-generated from EN name if empty
admin.section_custom_specs_hint: Add part-specific attributes (teeth, density, nominal voltage…). Only filled rows appear on the product page.
admin.section_codes_hint: OEM and cross-reference codes make this part discoverable by any of them.
admin.promo_hint: Promo price must be lower than the regular price. If you leave dates empty, promotion is active anytime.
admin.confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete this item? This cannot be undone.
admin.tecdoc_title: Look up a part in TecDoc
admin.tecdoc_subtitle: Enter a part code and we'll fetch the catalogue data from TecDoc via Apify.
admin.tecdoc_no_results: No TecDoc results for this code.
admin.tecdoc_not_configured: Apify is not configured. Add APIFY_TOKEN and APIFY_TECDOC_ACTOR_ID to .env.local.
admin.tecdoc_edit_after: Imported as DRAFT (inactive). Open the products list to edit and publish.

panel.scope_locked_hint: This page is only available for one book — the switcher is disabled.
panel.dashboard_subtitle: Viewing {scope}. Switch the other book from the top bar.
panel.dashboard_scaffold_title: Panel is live — pages ship in phases
panel.dashboard_scaffold_body: Today's sales, cash balance, draft purchases and low-stock alerts will land here.
panel.dashboard_today_breakdown_empty: No sales on this account today.
panel.pdf_save_hint: To save as PDF: in the print dialog, pick "Save as PDF" as the destination instead of a printer.
panel.settings_subtitle: Internal product code, invoice and delivery-note numbering.
panel.settings_section_code_body: The internal code auto-generated for new products and purchase lines. Supplier codes (e.g. 2400282) stay in the back end — customers only see the internal code (e.g. 2245402A).
panel.settings_next_code_helper: (preview for category {sample} — updates live as you edit the template)
panel.settings_sequence_helper: The number used for the last generated code. The next code will use {next}.
panel.settings_letter_helper: Current suffix (A/B/C/...). Advances automatically on collision.
panel.settings_section_pricing_body: Default markup applied on top of cost when adding a product from a purchase line. You can always override the price in the product form.
panel.settings_default_markup_helper: e.g. 30 means price = cost × 1.30. Set 0 to disable the auto markup.
panel.settings_section_numbering_body: Current series and numbers for fiscal invoices (Refrens) and delivery notes. The system increments automatically with each issue.
panel.clienti_subtitle: Profiles with transactions in this book. Walk-in customers only appear on their own orders.
panel.client_new_subtitle: Add a persistent customer searchable later from new sales, proformas and delivery notes. Email optional — placeholder generated if missing.
panel.client_form_type_business_sub: Company with IDNO / VAT — for official invoicing
panel.client_form_discount_help: Auto-applied to every sale for this customer. Leave 0 if none.
panel.produse_subtitle: Shared panel/website catalog. The Margin column is private (never shown publicly).
panel.produse_search_placeholder: Search internal code, name, brand, supplier code...
panel.product_form_internal_code_helper: The code shown publicly to customers. Never the supplier code.
panel.product_form_supplier_code_helper: The code on the supplier invoice. Never appears publicly.
panel.product_form_cost_helper: Used for margin and reports. Private.
panel.product_create_subtitle: The internal code is empty by default. Click "Generate internal code" or enter an OE code manually.
panel.product_prefill_banner: Adding a new product from purchase {doc} ({supplier})
panel.product_prefill_help: The main fields (internal code, supplier code, name, cost) were prefilled from the purchase line. Stock stays at 0 — it gets incremented automatically when you post the purchase.
panel.stock_subtitle: Shared panel/website view. Stock decreases automatically on every confirmed sale.
panel.sale_subtitle: Pick Book 1 (with invoice) or Book 2 (cash), then customer, products and delivery. The delivery note is generated automatically at the end.
panel.sale_scope_conta1_body: Generates the invoice via Refrens (PDF + email to customer) and records it in the official ledger.
panel.sale_scope_conta2_body: No fiscal invoice. If payment is cash, it's recorded in the cash register.
panel.sale_client_walkin_email_hint: (required if you want the invoice emailed via Refrens)
panel.sale_client_no_results: No customer found. Click "Walk-in customer" for an ad-hoc sale.
panel.sale_markup_hint: Optional. Enter a % to recompute every line's price from cost. Leave empty to keep catalog prices (with the client's discount when set).
panel.sale_lines_empty: No product added yet. Search above.
panel.sale_delivery_address_placeholder: e.g. Sireți st. 12, Strășeni district, MD 3731
panel.sale_vat_hint: Optional. Leave empty if this sale doesn't include VAT.
panel.sale_vat_locked_conta2: Conta 2 — VAT locked at 0. The price you typed is final.
panel.achizitii_subtitle: Import supplier invoices; receive goods and update stock from here.
panel.achizitii_new_subtitle: Save as draft, then on the detail page press "Receive & post" to increment stock.
panel.achizitii_detail_post_confirm: Confirm receipt? Stock will be incremented automatically.
panel.achizitii_catalog_banner_body: Click "Add to catalog" on each line to create the product with prefilled data. Unlinked lines are auto-created at posting with default settings.
panel.facturi_subtitle: Fiscal invoices generated through Refrens. The internal numbering (series + number) is used for exports.
panel.facturi_search_placeholder: Search invoice number or Refrens ID...
panel.delivery_list_subtitle: Printable documents for the driver with storage location, products, price and payment method.
panel.delivery_empty: No delivery note in {book}. Use "New sale" to generate one.
panel.delivery_delete_confirm: Delete this delivery note? This cannot be undone.
panel.delivery_company_tagline: Auto parts for cars, vans, buses and trucks
panel.delivery_print_hint: If the URL appears in the print header/footer, uncheck "Headers and footers" in the browser print dialog.
panel.expenses_subtitle: Expenses with an invoice. For Book 2 cash expenses use "Cash expenses".
panel.cash_subtitle: For non-invoice flows. Cash-paid expenses are reflected automatically in the cash register.
panel.reports_subtitle: Default range: {from} → {to}. Adjust from the controls and download CSV.
panel.reports_section_margin_help: Margin uses the cost_price snapshot from the moment of sale. Orders predating the panel have no snapshot and don't appear here.
panel.reports_section_turnover_help: Sold in 30 days / current stock. >1 = moves fast; <0.5 = sits on the shelf.
panel.reports_empty: No result for the selected range.
panel.stats_chart_empty: No data for the selected range.
panel.export_subtitle: Download a CSV with the fiscal invoices issued in the chosen range. Includes number, date, customer, IDNO, total and Refrens PDF link (if any).
panel.export_note_scope: The CSV only includes invoices with account_scope = conta1.
panel.export_note_refrens: Refrens links only open in the browser if you're signed into Refrens.
panel.export_note_zip: For a ZIP export with all PDFs, contact me — it needs extra configuration.
panel.triage_subtitle: New orders from inter-bus.md land here. Press Book 1 (with invoice) or Book 2 (cash) to route them. Triaged orders also appear in their respective ledgers.
panel.triage_empty_pending: No new orders to triage. Nice!
panel.triage_done_conta1: Order routed to Book 1 — appears in invoices
panel.triage_done_conta2: Order routed to Book 2 — cash balance updated if paid cash
panel.proforma_list_subtitle: Pre-invoice documents for orders not yet in stock (7-day delivery). Once paid, convert to a fiscal invoice.
panel.proforma_empty: No proforma yet. Click "New proforma" to create one from scratch or use the site orders page.
panel.proforma_new_subtitle: Create a commercial offer with parts that aren't yet in the catalog. Enter the part code, description and price — the customer receives the document for quick acceptance.
panel.proforma_form_customer_validation: Fill in at least the customer name
panel.proforma_form_lines_help: Parts don't need to exist in the catalog — enter the supplier code, name and price directly.
panel.proforma_form_lines_validation: Add at least one line with a name and quantity
panel.proforma_form_line_partcode_empty: New code — fill the name and price manually
panel.proforma_form_scope_hint_conta1: Conta 1 — fiscal, defaults to 20% VAT (editable per line).
panel.proforma_form_scope_hint_conta2: Conta 2 — non-fiscal, VAT locked at 0%. The price you type is the final price.
panel.proforma_form_notes_placeholder: e.g. "delivery in 7 working days after advance payment"
panel.proforma_edit_subtitle: Change the customer, lines, currency, language or notes. Series and number stay the same.
panel.proforma_convert_confirm: Confirm the proforma was paid? A new fiscal invoice will be created with status PAID.
panel.proforma_convert_panel_hint: Pick the payment status and which set of books the new invoice lands in.
panel.proforma_convert_deferred_days_hint: Invoice is issued unpaid; due date is set relative to today.
panel.proforma_void_confirm: Void this proforma? This cannot be reverted.
panel.invoice_mark_paid_panel_hint: Amount and currency are prefilled from the invoice — change them if a different sum came in.
panel.invoice_void_confirm: Void this invoice? Stock will be restored and the order will be cancelled. Cannot be undone.
panel.po_section_body: Press "Issue PO" to assign a number and send the order to the supplier. Goods are received separately when they arrive.
panel.po_print_please_notify: PLEASE NOTIFY US IN CASE OF ANY PRICE DEVIATIONS
panel.po_no_lines: Add at least one line before issuing a PO.
panel.sale_discount_hint: Discount applies to the gross total (subtotal + VAT). Leave 0 to disable.
panel.sale_discount_new_total_hint: Original total: {original} {currency}. Type the final amount.
panel.sale_discount_none_hint: Leave empty to apply no discount.
invoice_print_terms: Payment: Payment must be made in full via bank transfer to the account specified on this document, according to the agreed terms (e.g. advance payment / net 30 days).
Delivery: Goods will be delivered as per the conditions stated above (Incoterms if applicable). Any delay caused by third-party carriers is beyond our responsibility.
Warranty: All products are covered by a 24-month warranty starting from the invoicing date, for manufacturing defects under normal use and proper installation.
Ownership: Ownership of goods remains with the seller until full payment is received.
Claims: Any claim regarding damage or discrepancies must be submitted in writing within 5 days of receipt of goods.
Jurisdiction: All disputes arising from this document shall be governed by the laws of the seller's jurisdiction (Republic of Moldova).
Validity: This document is valid for 15 days unless otherwise agreed.
Bank Charges: All bank transfer fees (including intermediary bank fees) are to be borne by the buyer (OUR transfer type).

Technical Specifications: All items are supplied according to the agreed product codes and specifications. Compatibility and proper installation remain the buyer's responsibility. No liability is accepted for misuse or improper installation.
Partial Deliveries: The seller reserves the right to make partial deliveries. Each partial delivery is a separate transaction and may be invoiced individually.

Force Majeure: The seller shall not be held liable for delays or failure to perform due to circumstances beyond its control (natural disasters, transport interruptions, political unrest, supplier delays, etc.).
panel.pin_delete_subtitle: Enter the admin PIN to confirm deletion.
panel.monthly_send_title: Send monthly purchases to the accountant
panel.monthly_send_subtitle: Only conta 1 purchases will be included. Pick the month and enter the PIN.
panel.monthly_send_empty: No conta 1 purchases in this month.
panel.pin_confirm_subtitle: Enter the admin PIN to confirm.
